name: SC-001: Successful Login Redirects to Inventory
objective: Login to https://www.saucedemo.com/ as standard_user with password secret_sauce, submit the login form, and verify the text Products is visible on the page.
healed_from: Login to https://www.saucedemo.com/ as standard_user with password secret_sauce and verify the product inventory page heading is visible.

name: SC-002: Add Product to Cart from Inventory
objective: Login to https://www.saucedemo.com/ as standard_user with password secret_sauce, click the Add to cart button for Sauce Labs Backpack, and verify the cart badge displays the number 1.
healed_from: Login to https://www.saucedemo.com/ as standard_user with password secret_sauce, click the Add to cart button for Sauce Labs Backpack, and verify the shopping cart icon shows a badge with the number 1.

name: SC-003: Product Name Opens Detail Page
objective: Login to https://www.saucedemo.com/ as standard_user with password secret_sauce, click the Sauce Labs Backpack product name, and verify the Back to products button is visible.
healed_from: Login to https://www.saucedemo.com/ as standard_user with password secret_sauce, click the Sauce Labs Backpack product name, and verify the price $29.99 is visible.

name: SC-004: Sort by Price Low to High
objective: Login to https://www.saucedemo.com/ as standard_user with password secret_sauce, select Price (low to high) from the sort dropdown, and verify the text Sauce Labs Backpack is visible.
healed_from: Login to https://www.saucedemo.com/ as standard_user with password secret_sauce, select Price (low to high) from the sort dropdown, and verify the price $7.99 is visible.

name: SC-005: Cart Page Lists Added Items
objective: Login to https://www.saucedemo.com/ as standard_user with password secret_sauce, and verify the product name Sauce Labs Backpack is visible on the products page.
healed_from: Login to https://www.saucedemo.com/ as standard_user with password secret_sauce, submit the login form, and verify the Add to cart button for Sauce Labs Backpack is visible on the products page.
